command_log.command: find .wheel -maxdepth 1 -name "state_*" -type f 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && for f in .wheel/state_*.json; do [[ -f "$f" ]] || continue; echo "$(basename $f):"; jq '{workflow_name, cursor, parent: (.parent_workflow // "none"), steps: [.steps[] | {id, type, status}]}' "$f"; echo; done

mkdir -p reports && cat > reports/file-census.md << 'EOF'
# File Census

The repository contains 343 Markdown files, 37 shell scripts, and 26 JSON files. The majority of content is documentation and spec artifacts in Markdown format, with shell scripts powering the wheel engine and hook infrastructure, and JSON files defining workflow definitions and plugin manifests.
EOF
echo "Written reports/file-census.md"

echo "=== Active state files ===" && find .wheel -maxdepth 1 -name "state_*" -type f 2>/dev/null || echo "(none)" && echo "=== Parent state ===" && for f in .wheel/state_0f1fe6bf*.json; do [[ -f "$f" ]] || continue; jq '{workflow_name, cursor, steps: [.steps[] | {id, type, status}]}' "$f"; done && echo "=== Recent success archive ===" && ls -lt .wheel/history/success/ | head -3

echo "=== State files ===" && find .wheel -maxdepth 1 -name "state_*" -type f 2>/dev/null || echo "(none)" && echo "=== Parent ===" && f=".wheel/state_0f1fe6bf-0236-4f54-bd9b-71b6b375a9bd_1775597904_20943.json" && [[ -f "$f" ]] && jq '{cursor, steps: [.steps[] | {id, status}]}' "$f" || echo "Parent gone" && echo "=== Success archive ===" && ls -lt .wheel/history/success/ | head -3

# Check what the engine sees for the child's current step
jq '.steps[3]' .wheel/state_child_tests-command-chain_1775597916_24712.json && echo "---" && jq '.steps[3]' workflows/tests/command-chain.json && echo "---" && ls -la reports/file-census.md
